title: Malworld SMP Modpack
description: A official modpack for the Malworld SMP
body:
# Malworld Modpack

**This page has been rebranded to fit the new minecraft server "Malworld"**

![ Malworld Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac33eb354aa20a931f7c29dab13cdae72f43d5f4.png)

This is the offical modpack for Malworld!

# Website
Since we moved server providers we are no longer have our own website at the moment.
**Development is still in progress so it will be up soon!**

# Discord
We do have a small discord server where you can have fun together with the community [discord](https://discord.com/invite/nYpuPtUVHR](https://discord.gg/2V8Th5Zkse)

# Music Mod
We do have a custom music mod were all the music for events are located!
There are all the credits to all the authors

<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

### Terraria Calamity Mod OST - DM DOKURO
<details>
<summary>Songs used</summary>

- Antarctic Reinforcement
- 1NF3S+@+!0N
- The filthy mind
- Pest Of The Cosmos
- Catastrophic Fabrications
- Galactic destruction
- Feral Amalgamation
- Fly of Beelzebub
- Threats of the ocean floor
- void
- Return to slime
- Blood Coagulant
- Unholy insurgency
- Interstellar Stomper
- Murderswarm
- Universal Collapse
- Outcast of the Sulphurous Seas
- Unholy Ambush
- Sanctuary
- Cerebral augmentations
- Guarden of the fromor seas
- Glutionous arbitracton
- Open Frenzy

If I forgot some soundtracks please let me know. 

Yes we do like the Calamity mod OST a lot.
</details>

### A core game OST - sapheria_xplict / ZadonoAce

<details>
<summary>Songs used</summary>

**Due to the conversation of sapheria_xplict I was told that Thought Deprivation will be removed from the modpack :(**
**BUT I was given permission to use these so its all good!**

- Test your luck - sapheria_xplict
- Test your luck v1.5 - sapheria_xplict
- Approximate nightmare - sapheria_xplict

</details>

### TWISTED GARDEN (Nameless Deity Theme) [Remix] - Kuudray (Orignal Author: ENNWAY)

If I forgot any authors please let me know

</details>

**That's all folks!**
